case_title: TYLER CHEUNG VS. WILLIAM EDWIN BATHUIST

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT BATHUIST, WILLIAM EDWIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **CARD NOT SIGNED** SERVED OCT-03-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BATHUIST, WILLIAM EDWIN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, TYLER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATHUIST, WILLIAM EDWIN $2,391.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,476.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,125 FOR THE VALUE OF HIS CAR, $150.00 FOR LOSS OF VEHICLE, AND $1,710.00 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 40% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT BATHUIST, WILLIAM EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BATHUIST, WILLIAM EDWIN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
